question: What is the check-in time?
answer: Check-in time is 3:00 PM. Early check-in may be available upon request and subject to availability.

question: What is the check-out time?
answer: Check-out time is 12:00 PM noon. Late check-out can be arranged for an additional fee subject to availability.

question: Can I do early check-in?
answer: Early check-in is available from 10:00 AM for an additional charge. Please contact the front desk to confirm availability.

question: Can I request late check-out?
answer: Late check-out until 2:00 PM is available for a small fee. Extensions beyond 2:00 PM are charged at half the daily rate.

question: Do you offer airport transfers?
answer: Yes we provide complimentary airport shuttle service every hour from 6 AM to 11 PM. Private transfers can also be arranged.

question: Is parking available at the hotel?
answer: Yes we offer free self-parking for all guests. Valet parking is also available for a small daily fee.

question: Do you have electric vehicle charging stations?
answer: We have 4 EV charging stations in our main parking area available on first come first served basis at no extra charge.

question: How far is the hotel from the airport?
answer: The hotel is 12 kilometers from the international airport. The drive takes approximately 20 to 30 minutes depending on traffic.

question: What dining options are available?
answer: We have three restaurants: Oasis (international cuisine) open 6 AM to 11 PM
category: The Grill (steakhouse) open 6 PM to 11 PM
column4: and The Cafe (light bites) open 24 hours.

question: Do you have room service?
answer: Yes room service is available 24 hours a day. The full menu is available from 7 AM to 11 PM and a limited menu operates overnight.

question: Do you offer vegetarian or vegan meals?
answer: Absolutely. All our restaurants offer a dedicated vegetarian and vegan menu. Please inform us of any dietary restrictions during booking.

question: Is breakfast included in the room rate?
answer: Breakfast is included in Deluxe and Suite packages. Standard rooms offer breakfast for an additional charge of PKR 1500 per person.

question: Do you have a swimming pool?
answer: Yes we have a heated outdoor pool open from 7 AM to 10 PM and an indoor pool open year round from 6 AM to 11 PM.

question: Is there a gym or fitness center?
answer: Our 24-hour fitness center is fully equipped with cardio machines weights and free weights. Certified trainers are available from 6 AM to 9 PM.

question: Do you have a spa?
answer: Our luxury spa is open from 9 AM to 9 PM offering massages facials body treatments and a steam room. Appointments are recommended.

question: Is there a business center?
answer: Yes our business center is open 24 hours with computers printers and high speed internet. Conference rooms are also available for booking.

question: Do you have free WiFi?
answer: Complimentary high-speed WiFi is available throughout the hotel. Premium bandwidth packages are available for large file transfers or video conferencing.

question: Are pets allowed in the hotel?
answer: We welcome pets up to 20 kg in our designated pet-friendly rooms. A refundable pet deposit of PKR 5000 is required.

question: What is your cancellation policy?
answer: Free cancellation is available up to 48 hours before check-in. Cancellations within 48 hours incur a one-night charge.

question: Do you allow smoking in rooms?
answer: The hotel is entirely non-smoking. Designated smoking areas are available outside. A PKR 10000 cleaning fee applies if smoking occurs in rooms.

question: Are children welcome?
answer: We warmly welcome families. Children under 12 stay free when using existing bedding. Cribs and extra beds are available upon request.

question: Do you have accessible rooms for guests with disabilities?
answer: Yes we have fully accessible rooms with roll-in showers grab bars and widened doorways. Please inform us during booking to ensure proper accommodation.

question: Is the hotel wheelchair accessible?
answer: The entire hotel including all restaurants and facilities is wheelchair accessible with ramps elevators and accessible restrooms throughout.

question: What types of rooms do you offer?
answer: We offer Standard Rooms Deluxe Rooms Junior Suites Executive Suites and Presidential Suites. Each category comes in single and double occupancy options.

question: What is included in the suite?
answer: Suites include a separate living area king bed premium toiletries a minibar access to the Executive Lounge and complimentary breakfast for two guests.

question: Do rooms have a minibar?
answer: Deluxe rooms and suites come with a stocked minibar. Standard rooms can request a minibar setup at front desk for an additional daily fee.

question: Can I request a room with a view?
answer: Sea view and garden view rooms are available at a premium. You can request your preferred view during booking but it is subject to availability.

question: How can I make a reservation?
answer: You can book directly on our website by calling our reservation line or through any major travel booking platform. Direct bookings get the best rate guaranteed.

question: Can I modify my reservation?
answer: Yes reservations can be modified up to 24 hours before check-in at no charge via phone email or the online portal.

question: Do you offer group booking discounts?
answer: Yes we offer special rates for groups of 10 or more rooms. Please contact our sales team for a customized group package.

question: Is a deposit required to book?
answer: A credit card is required to guarantee the booking. No charge is made until check-in unless the booking is non-refundable.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept all major credit and debit cards including Visa MasterCard American Express as well as bank transfers and cash in PKR USD and EUR.

question: Do you accept cryptocurrency payments?
answer: Currently we do not accept cryptocurrency payments. We accept traditional payment methods including major international credit cards.

question: Can I pay in a foreign currency?
answer: Yes we accept USD EUR and GBP at the hotel. Exchange rates are set daily and displayed at the front desk.

question: Do you have a loyalty program?
answer: Yes our loyalty program rewards frequent guests with points redeemable for free nights room upgrades dining credits and spa treatments.

question: How do I join the loyalty program?
answer: Membership is free and open to all guests. You can sign up at check-in on our website or through our mobile app.

question: What events or activities do you offer?
answer: We organize weekly cultural evenings cooking classes yoga sessions and city tours. Check the concierge desk or hotel app for the current schedule.

question: Can you help with sightseeing arrangements?
answer: Our concierge team is happy to arrange guided city tours day trips car rentals and tickets to local attractions.

question: Do you have childcare services?
answer: Yes we offer supervised childcare and a kids club from 8 AM to 8 PM. Activities are tailored for children aged 3 to 12 years.

question: Is there a laundry service?
answer: Full laundry and dry cleaning service is available. Same day service is offered if items are submitted before 9 AM. Express service is also available.

question: Do you have a gift shop?
answer: Yes our lobby gift shop carries local handicrafts souvenirs chocolates flowers and essential travel items and is open from 8 AM to 10 PM.
